raw_searches.query: news intelligence platform AI startup 2026 launch funding
raw_searches.abstract: No new news intelligence startups with significant funding found. AI funding broadly continues but no direct WorldPulse competitors launched. Granola ($125M), AMI Labs ($1B seed) — unrelated verticals.
Ground News confirmed Podcasts & Opinions + Daily Briefing features. No new major threats. App updates are UI/UX improvements. Still 50K+ sources.

raw_searches.query: open source news aggregation real-time verification 2026
raw_searches.abstract: WorldMonitor and Intell Weave confirmed still active. No new well-resourced open-source competitors. FreshRSS/tt-rss remain traditional aggregators without intelligence features.
